steps.title: Identify the target meaning for 'confirmed'
steps.content: The passage exaggerates calling the land a “garden,” but says the flower beds “confirmed the illusion”—they made the exaggerated claim seem true by providing visible evidence.

steps.title: Find the word expressing this sense
steps.content: ”Substantiated” means to provide evidence or substance for a claim. Here, the beautiful blooming pansies substantiate the “garden” label—they give it visible, tangible proof. The other three convey unrelated meanings: necessitated (made necessary), designated (formally named), and promised (suggested future events). That matches choice B — B is correct.
